matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) (MC4R-region adiposity association marker)
MC4R loss-of-function model (MC4R monogenic obesity model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MC4R melanocortin receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking and Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) dosage suggests this sample carries the MC4R prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. This specific marker is curated as MC4R-region adiposity association marker. rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) is curated as a MC4R marker for Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the MC4R prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MC4R melanocortin receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking and Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed MC4R variant places this sample in the curated MC4R research context. The local MC4R bundle is melanocortin receptor signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. MC4R variants can alter or tag melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a MC4R variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus.
